page_metadata.biotools__summary: G-SESAME is a suite of online tools for measuring the semantic similarities of Gene Ontology (GO) terms and the functional similarities of gene products, as well as data mining the GO database.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: G-SESAME is a suite of online tools for measuring the semantic similarities of Gene Ontology (GO) terms and the functional similarities of gene products, as well as data mining the GO database.
